name: Stick Rush
author: Poki
description: Are you looking for a rush of adrenaline? Then check out Stick Rush - an action-packed game that faces you off against waves of challenging enemies. Use gold that you claim from your defeated enemies to unlock rooms and defenses in various levels. With each defeated wave, you get closer to unlocking new powerful weapons which you can upgrade without limits. You can also play the game together with a friend locally on the same computer for double the mayhem and fun! Are you ready for the ultimate rush? How do I play Stick Rush? Move by using the WASD, arrow keys, or by clicking and draging with the mouse. Next Wave: F Equip Weapon: Spacebar Who created Stick Rush? Stick Rush is created by EasyCats. Play their other games on Poki: Archer Castle , Battle Wheels , Merge Arena , Merge Penguins and War Master ! How can I play Stick Rush for free? You can play Stick Rush for free on Poki. Can I play Stick Rush on mobile devices and desktop? Stick Rush can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Stick Rush with my friend? Yes! Stick Rush is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
